title: Sort Contacts by Party and Name
description: Write a query to retrieve all columns from book1, sorted by Party_Name in descending order. Where two contacts share the same party, sort them by Contact_Name in ascending order.

schema: CREATE TABLE book1 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT * FROM book1 ORDER BY Party_Name DESC, Contact_Name ASC
